sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: CME 그룹은 2025년 3분기 15억 달러의 매출과 9억 800만 달러의 순이익을 기록하며 견조한 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출 15억 달러 및 영업이익 9억 7,300만 달러를 기록하며 시장의 변동성 속에서도 안정적인 성과를 유지했습니다.
시장 데이터 부문에서 역대 최고치인 2억 300만 달러의 매출을 달성하며 수익원 다각화 성과를 보였습니다.

businessChanges.text: FanDuel과의 새로운 파트너십 체결 및 암호화폐 선물·옵션의 24/7 거래 도입을 통해 서비스 접근성을 확대하고 있습니다.
2012년 변동 배당 정책 도입 이후 현재까지 총 295억 달러를 주주에게 환원하며 주주 가치 제고를 지속하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 GAAP 기준 순이익은 9억 800만 달러, 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 2.49달러를 기록했습니다.
조정 기준 순이익은 10억 달러, 조정 희석 주당순이익은 2.68달러로 집계되었습니다.
청산 및 거래 수수료 매출은 12억 달러이며, 계약당 평균 수수료는 0.702달러입니다.
올해 첫 9개월 동안 약 35억 달러의 배당금을 지급했습니다.

watchItems.text: 새로운 파트너십과 24/7 암호화폐 거래 서비스가 향후 거래량 및 수수료 수익에 미치는 기여도를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit9919302025.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Media contact Investor contact Timothy Barello, 212.299.2256 Adam Minick, 312.340.8365 Laurie Bischel, 312.648.8698 investors@cmegroup.com news@cmegroup.com CME-G cmegroup.mediaroom.com FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CME Group Inc. Announces Third-Quarter 2025 Financial Results CHICAGO, October 22, 2025 - CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ: CME) today reported financial results for the third quarter of 2025. The company reported revenue of $1.5 billion and operating income of $973 million for the third quarter of 2025. Net income was $908 million and diluted earnings per common share were $2.49. On an adjusted basis, net income was $1.0 billion and diluted earnings per common share were $2.68. Financial results presented on an adj  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.5 billion = 15억 달러; $973 million = 9억 7,300만 달러; $908 million = 9억 800만 달러; $1.0 billion = 10억 달러; $1.5 = 1.5달러; $973 = 973달러; $908 = 908달러; $2.49 = 2.49달러; $2.68 = 2.68달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러.

on-GAAP results. 1 “Global clients continued relying on CME Group markets across all asset classes as they sought to navigate risk and pursue opportunities amid ongoing uncertainty in Q3,” said Terry Duffy, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, CME Group. “As a result, we achieved our second-highest third-quarter ADV, as well as adjusted net income and adjusted earnings per share on par with last year’s exceptionally strong Q3 performance. Looking ahead, we remain focused on delivering efficiencies, new products and expanded access for market users, including through our new partnership with FanDuel and 24/7 trading in our cryptocurrency futures and options.” Clearing and transaction fees revenue for third-quarter 2025 totaled $1.2 billion. The total average rate per contract was $0.702. Market data revenue totaled a record $203 million for third-quarter 2025. As  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $203 million = 2억 300만 달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $0.702 = 0.702달러; $203 = 203달러.

e company had $2.6 billion in cash (including $200 million deposited with Fixed Income Clearing Corporation, which is included in other current assets) and $3.4 billion of debt. The company paid dividends during the first nine months of the year of approximately $3.5 billion. The company has returned over $29.5 billion to shareholders in the form of dividends since the implementation of the variable dividend policy in early 2012. 1. A reconciliation of the non-GAAP financial results mentioned to the respective GAAP figures can be found within the Reconciliation of Adjusted Operating Income and Adjusted Net Income and Adjusted Diluted Earnings per Common Share charts at the end of the financial statements. - more - Page 2 CME Group will hold a Q&A conference call to discuss  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.6 billion = 26억 달러; $200 million = 2억 달러; $3.4 billion = 34억 달러; $3.5 billion = 35억 달러; $29.5 billion = 295억 달러; $2.6 = 2.6달러; $200 = 200달러; $3.4 = 3.4달러; $29.5 = 29.5달러; $3.5 = 3.5달러.
